attachments.name: Step Passed: batch file is created for below data as full dataset
Step Passed: batch file is uploaded in s3 bucket
Step Passed: file will be moved to destination bucket and inf ack file will be created
Step Passed: inf ack file has success status for processed batch file
Step Passed: bus ack files will be created
Step Passed: CSV bus ack will not have any entry of successfully processed records
Step Passed: Json bus ack will only contain file metadata and no failure record entry
Step Passed: Audit table will have correct status, queue name and record count for the processed batch file
Step Passed: same batch file is uploaded again in s3 bucket
Step Passed: file will be moved to destination bucket and inf ack file will be created for duplicate batch file upload
Step Passed: inf ack file has failure status for processed batch file
Step Passed: bus ack file will not be created
Step Passed: Audit table will have 'Not processed - Duplicate', 'MAVIS_HPV' and 'None' for the processed batch file
